reference: Hi, I am thirty-two years old. I thought I was pregnant; I have sore, leaky breasts, tiredness, and a little nausea that goes away after I eat. I only had spotting for a few hours during the week I expected my period. I started getting severe pains in my right side and began to worry because I have a Mirena intrauterine device in place. I went to the doctor who ruled out pregnancy, but my lower abdomen is sore to the touch. Any amount of pressure hurts, and I still have sharp pains in my side. What could be going on?
text: Hi. I am 32 years old. I thought I was pregnant. I have sore, leafy breasts, tiredness, and a little nausea that goes away after I eat. I only had spotting for a few hours during the week I expected my period. I started getting severe pains in my right side and began to worry because I have a Mirena intrauterine device in place. I went to the doctor who ruled out pregnancy, but my lower abdomen is sore to the touch. Any amount of pressure hurts and I still have sharp pains in my side. What could be done?
